channel.title: NPR Topics: Science
channel.description: The latest health and science news. Updates on medicine, healthy living, nutrition, drugs, diet, and advances in science and technology. Subscribe to the Health & Science podcast.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Bean plants call for aerial reinforcements when caterpillars attack
item.description: NPR's Short Wave talks about a weakness in a well-known insect repellant, how plants call wasps to their defense and how bigger rewards speed up learning, in mice.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Short Wave talks about a weakness in a well-known insect repellant, how plants call wasps to their defense and how bigger rewards speed up learning, in mice.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Chinn

item.title: WHO chief lands in Congo to address rare Ebola outbreak amid distrust and insecurity
item.description: The head of the World Health Organization arrived in Congo's capital, Kinshasa, to witness efforts against an outbreak of a rare type of Ebola virus.
item.content:encoded:
The head of the World Health Organization arrived in Congo's capital, Kinshasa, to witness efforts against an outbreak of a rare type of Ebola virus.

(Image credit: Samy Ntumba Shambuyi)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Blue Origin rocket explodes on the launch pad during an engine-firing test
item.description: A rocket belonging to Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin exploded during a test at the launch pad Thursday night, ahead of a satellite launch planned for next week.
item.content:encoded:
A rocket belonging to Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin exploded during a test at the launch pad Thursday night, ahead of a satellite launch planned for next week.

(Image credit: John Raoux)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Happy, who taught researchers that elephants can recognize themselves, is euthanized
item.description: Happy, a Bronx Zoo elephant who gave researchers new insight into the animal's behavior and became the crux of a closely watched animal rights case, has been euthanized at age 55.
item.content:encoded:
Happy, a Bronx Zoo elephant who gave researchers new insight into the animal's behavior and became the crux of a closely watched animal rights case, has been euthanized at age 55.

(Image credit: Bebeto Matthews)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Inside the effort to save one of America's most imperiled salamanders
item.description: When a species is facing extinction, it takes an enormous human effort to stave it off. Case in point: the painstaking campaign to save the frosted flatwoods salamander.
item.content:encoded:
When a species is facing extinction, it takes an enormous human effort to stave it off. Case in point: the painstaking campaign to save the frosted flatwoods salamander.

(Image credit: Nathan Rott)
item.dc:creator: Nathan Rott

item.title: NASA lays out moon base plans with landers, buggies and drones at the top of the list
item.description: The space agency outlined the first phase of its moon base plans on Tuesday, awarding hundreds of millions of dollars in contracts to four U.S. companies.
item.content:encoded:
The space agency outlined the first phase of its moon base plans on Tuesday, awarding hundreds of millions of dollars in contracts to four U.S. companies.

(Image credit: NASA via AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: 'My body carried me,' Elizabeth Smart says. Now she's celebrating it
item.description: Her abduction at age 14 drew international attention. After her rescue, Smart says she struggled with feeling shame around her body. Bodybuilding has helped her see herself differently.
item.content:encoded:
Her abduction at age 14 drew international attention. After her rescue, Smart says she struggled with feeling shame around her body. Bodybuilding has helped her see herself differently.

(Image credit: Kim Raff for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Windsor Johnston

item.title: Disaster season is coming. Here are 3 things you can do to prepare
item.description: Insurance is supposed to soften the blow when homes burn or flood. With some preparation, you can better your odds of a smoother recovery if disaster strikes.
item.content:encoded:
Insurance is supposed to soften the blow when homes burn or flood. With some preparation, you can better your odds of a smoother recovery if disaster strikes.

(Image credit: Brandon Bell)
item.dc:creator: Michael Copley

item.title: California chemical tank has cracked, causing state of emergency, thousands to evacuate
item.description: One California town is in a state of emergency and 50,000 people are under an evacuation order as a malfunctioning chemical tank at an aerospace plant is overheating and could leak or explode.
item.content:encoded:
One California town is in a state of emergency and 50,000 people are under an evacuation order as a malfunctioning chemical tank at an aerospace plant is overheating and could leak or explode.

(Image credit: Apu Gomes)
item.dc:creator: Geoff Brumfiel

item.title: The Enhanced Games are Sunday. Here's what to know about the controversial event
item.description: Dozens of athletes — including former Olympians — will participate in the Las Vegas event while using performance-enhancing drugs.
item.content:encoded:
Dozens of athletes — including former Olympians — will participate in the Las Vegas event while using performance-enhancing drugs.

(Image credit: Ty ONeil)
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger
